## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] `npx tsc -b --noEmit` passes in `frontend/`.
- [ ] `python -m compileall backend/app` passes (or tests if you added them).
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md` / `docs/`) if the change is user-visible.
- [ ] I added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes).
